pullRequest.title: TASK-7089456938457 Add input validation for GET /users/{email} endpoint

issues.description: Consider adding more test cases for edge cases, such as an empty email or a very long email
The in-memory store _users_db is not thread-safe and may cause issues in a production environment
The get_user endpoint returns a 200 status code when the user is found, but the response model is UserResponse which has a status code of 201. Consider using a consistent status code

results.reason: Code raises HTTPException with status_code=400 in get_user function when email is invalid
Error message 'Invalid email format' is returned when email is invalid in get_user function

results.criterion: Non-existent but valid-format email returns HTTP 404
results.reason: Code raises HTTPException with status_code=404 in get_user function when email is not found

results.criterion: Add or update unit tests for both cases
results.reason: tests/test_users.py contains test_malformed_email_get_user and other relevant tests
